name: skill-framework-native
description: Native Codex integration for the local skill framework, memory system, and runtime artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Local framework skill, memory, and MCP bundle for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages the repository's framework MCP server, browser MCP server, and a native integration skill so Codex can discover the local skill framework as a first-class plugin.
defaultPrompt: Use the local framework plugin to inspect memory and routing state.
Refresh the workspace bootstrap bundle before planning framework work.
Search the local skill graph instead of grepping the repo first.
